common.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

landing.heroSubtitle: One place for households, events, lodging, and more
landing.heroDescription: Gatherstead helps extended families and organizations coordinate reunions, retreats, and recurring get-togethers — from meal planning to room assignments.
landing.featureHouseholdsDesc: Organize family members into households with contact info, dietary profiles, and relationships.
landing.featureEventsDesc: Plan gatherings with dates, locations, and attendee management.
landing.featureLodgingDesc: Manage rooms, RV spaces, and stay intents so everyone has a place.
landing.featureDirectoryDesc: A shared family directory with privacy controls and easy lookup.
